industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Public Joint-Stock Company Federal Hydro-Generating Company - RusHydro
summary: Public Joint-Stock Company Federal Hydro-Generating Company - RusHydro, together with its subsidiaries, generates, transmits, distributes, and sells electricity and heat energy in Russia. It generates power through approximately 60 renewable energy source facilities, including hydropower, wind power, and geo-thermal. The company has an installed electricity generation capacity of 39.5 GW. It also engages in the research and development, engineering, and electricity retail activities. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Moscow, Russia.
